acquisitions.comment: Detailed logging for acquisitions domain (invoices, POLs, receiving)

admin.comment: Standard logging for administrative operations (sets, etc.)

api_client.comment: Detailed logging for all HTTP requests/responses

rotation.comment: Rotate logs when they reach 10MB, keep 10 backups

output.comment: Output to both console and file, use JSON format for files

_usage_instructions.description: Copy this file to logging_config.json and customize as needed
_usage_instructions.location: Place in config/ directory or project root
_usage_instructions.security: Never commit actual API keys or sensitive data to version control
_usage_instructions.environments: You can create separate configs for SANDBOX and PRODUCTION
